name: @mcs-cli/registry
description: MCS Tech Pack Registry — Discover, search, and submit tech packs for Claude Code

scripts.dev: npm run build:worker && wrangler pages dev public --compatibility-date=2024-12-01 --binding PACKS=PACKS RATE_LIMIT=RATE_LIMIT
scripts.deploy: npm run build:worker && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=mcs-registry
